author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 7a7d9710. Added ExportedProgram::serialize()/deserialize() + save()/load() binary roundtrip. 'FTEP' magic + version-1 format embeds IrGraph::serialize() with a length prefix, then input_shapes, output_shape, input_specs (tagged static/dynamic with DimSpec bounds), and a deterministically-ordered state_dict. Symbolic shape metadata from #396 round-trips fully. 6 new tests; 3906 workspace tests pass.
